name: Push-Up
setup: Plank position, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width
Body forms straight line from head to heels
execution: Lower chest toward floor, elbows at ~45 degrees
Go until chest touches floor or upper arms parallel
Push through palms to return to starting position
Keep body rigid throughout — no sagging or piking
cues: Squeeze glutes and brace core throughout
Break the bar (try to rotate hands outward)
progression: Wall → Incline → Knee → Full → Deficit → Weighted
